extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF, extract its text with UTF-8 encoding, and save it to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-in-memory.title: Extract PDF Text In-Memory Using Aspose.Pdf
extract-pdf-text-in-memory.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream and extract its text into another MemoryStream using the Aspose.Pdf PdfExtractor facade.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether a PDF file contains any textual content.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Files
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF documents, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save each output as a .txt file with the same base name.

check-pdf-for-text-and-images.title: Check PDF for Both Text and Images
check-pdf-for-text-and-images.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to verify that a PDF contains at least one piece of text and at least one image.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PdfExtractor, bind a PDF file, extract both text and images, and save the results to separate files.

extract-text-from-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
extract-text-from-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to provide the owner password to a protected PDF and extract its text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text-save-utf8.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-save-utf8.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF with UTF‑8 encoding and write the result to a text file.

extract-text-from-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-byte-array.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it into a byte array, and extracting its text with PdfExtractor without writing the extracted text to disk.

extract-pdf-text-split-by-pages.title: Extract PDF Text and Split by Pages
extract-pdf-text-split-by-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF, retrieve it via a MemoryStream, and split the result into individual pages using the form‑feed delimiter.

pdf-extractor-unit-test.title: Unit Test for Extracting Text with PdfExtractor
pdf-extractor-unit-test.description: Shows how to create a PDF containing known text and write an NUnit test that uses Aspose.Pdf.PdfExtractor to extract and verify the text.

extract-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF with PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to bind a PDF file, extract its textual content, and write the result to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF file and store it in a StringBuilder for further manipulation or saving.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.title: Batch Text Extraction from PDFs with PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and extract their text into separate .txt files.

extract-text-verify-temp-file.title: Extract Text from PDF and Verify via Temporary File
extract-text-verify-temp-file.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saving the text to a temporary file, reading it back, and confirming the extracted content matches the original.

extract-pdf-text-aes-encrypt.title: Extract PDF Text and AES‑Encrypt to File
extract-pdf-text-aes-encrypt.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then encrypt the extracted text with AES before saving it to a file.

detect-text-only-pdf-by-extracting-image.title: Detect Text‑Only PDF by Checking for Images
detect-text-only-pdf-by-extracting-image.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract any images into memory, and decide if the document is text‑only based on whether any images are found.

extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Shows how to accept a PDF as a byte array, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract its text, and return the extracted content as JSON.

extract-pdf-text-postgresql.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-postgresql.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and inserts the extracted text into a PostgreSQL table via ODBC.

cancel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
cancel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to use a CancellationToken to abort Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor text extraction when a user requests termination, checking the token after each page.

extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream for Further Processing
extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving it into a MemoryStream, and preparing the stream for use by another component.

extract-text-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a sample PDF, simulating a queue message, and extracting its text content using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and write it directly into a GZip compressed file.

batch-ocr-extraction.title: Batch OCR Text Extraction from PDFs using Aspose.Pdf AI
batch-ocr-extraction.description: Demonstrates processing multiple PDF files, extracting their text with Aspose.Pdf AI OCR copilot, and saving the results as text files.

pdf-diagnostic-count-pages-images-attach.title: PDF Diagnostic Tool: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments
pdf-diagnostic-count-pages-images-attach.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to obtain the total page count, extract and count images, and enumerate attachments in a PDF document.

create-pdf-summary-first-three-pages.title: Create PDF Summary with First Three Pages Text
create-pdf-summary-first-three-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from the first three pages of a PDF and generate a new summary PDF containing that extracted text.

extract-text-from-pdf-with-retry.title: Extract Text from PDF with Retry on I/O Errors
extract-text-from-pdf-with-retry.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and implementing a retry loop that attempts the extraction up to three times when an IOException occurs.

extract-text-from-pdf-cli.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-cli.description: Demonstrates a command‑line utility that binds a PDF file, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and writes the Unicode text to standard output.

extract-pdf-text-azure-table.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
extract-pdf-text-azure-table.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and sends the text as an entity to an Azure Table via a REST call.

async-pdf-text-image-extraction.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction
async-pdf-text-image-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text and images from a PDF file asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, keeping the UI responsive with async/await.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and write it into a TextWriter such as StringWriter for logging or further processing.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration to toggle extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from pages 5‑10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

extract-images-defined-in-resources.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
extract-images-defined-in-resources.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all images that are defined in the PDF resources by setting ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

extract-images-first-page-to-byte-arrays.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-first-page-to-byte-arrays.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and store them directly in memory as byte arrays for further processing.

extract-images-to-bmp.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as BMP
extract-images-to-bmp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them as BMP files, preserving the original resolution and color depth.

export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality 85
export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory.

extract-pdf-images-to-base64-json.title: Extract PDF Images to Base64 JSON
extract-pdf-images-to-base64-json.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF, convert each image stream to a Base64 string, and serialize the collection into JSON for transmission.

extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-pages-as-tiff.title: Extract PDF Pages as TIFF Images
extract-pdf-pages-as-tiff.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and save each page as a high‑resolution TIFF file for lossless archival storage using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-images-validate-signature.title: Extract PDF Images and Verify File Signatures
extract-pdf-images-validate-signature.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them to disk, and then checks each file's magic number to ensure the image is not corrupted.

parallel-image-extraction-from-multiple-.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
parallel-image-extraction-from-multiple-.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor together with Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-images-to-unc-share.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them directly to a UNC network share path.

extract-images-create-thumbnails.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
extract-images-create-thumbnails.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and generate PNG thumbnails with a maximum size of 200 pixels while preserving aspect ratio.

extract-images-using-pdfextractor.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
extract-images-using-pdfextractor.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor within a using block to ensure proper disposal of resources.

extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF with Password
extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to provide a user password for an encrypted PDF and extract all embedded images using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-text-ignore-images-pdfextractor.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
extract-text-ignore-images-pdfextractor.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only text from a PDF by not invoking any image extraction methods.

extract-pdf-images-to-html.title: Extract PDF Images to HTML with Base64
extract-pdf-images-to-html.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them in an HTML report via data URIs.

error-handling-corrupted-pdf-binding.title: Error Handling for Corrupted PDF Binding
error-handling-corrupted-pdf-binding.description: Demonstrates how to safely bind a PDF using PdfExtractor and catch specific exceptions when the file is corrupted or has an invalid format.

extract-pdf-stream.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream over Network
extract-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates receiving a PDF over a TCP socket and extracting its text and images using Aspose.Pdf without creating intermediate files.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and upload each image as a PNG to an Azure Blob container.

extract-pdf-images-and-compress.title: Extract PDF Images and Compress to ZIP
extract-pdf-images-and-compress.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them as PNG files, and compressing each PNG into a lossless ZIP archive.

extract-images-original-format.title: Extract Images in Original Format with PdfExtractor
extract-images-original-format.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each image on every page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves the images as PNG files, and generates a CSV manifest with file name, page number, width, and height.

extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull each image from a PDF and then upload the resulting PNG streams to an Amazon S3 bucket with the AWS SDK.

extract-images-pdf-word.title: Extract Images from PDF and Prepare for Word Embedding
extract-images-pdf-word.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with an image, extract the images using Aspose.Pdf, and prepare them for insertion into a Word document.

extract-pdf-text-page-by-page-progress.title: Extract PDF Text Page-by-Page with Console Progress
extract-pdf-text-page-by-page-progress.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a PDF and report progress to the console.

extract-all-images-from-pdf.title: Extract All Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract every image from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade by setting the page range to all pages and saving each image as PNG.

extract-images-ocr-openai-copilot.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI Copilot
extract-images-ocr-openai-copilot.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and then uses Aspose.Pdf.AI OpenAI OCR copilot to recognize hidden text in the images.

list-embedded-attachment-names.title: List Names of Embedded PDF Attachments
list-embedded-attachment-names.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract its attachments, and retrieve the attachment file names without saving them.

extract-pdf-attachments.title: Extract Embedded Attachments from PDF
extract-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all embedded file attachments from a PDF and save each to a specified output directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-with-timestamp.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Save with Timestamped Names
extract-pdf-attachments-with-timestamp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded attachments from a PDF, prepend a timestamp to each file name, and save the files to a specified directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Demonstrates how to extract all embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them to disk, and verify their integrity by calculating SHA‑256 hashes.

extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded files from a PDF and save them into subfolders based on their original extensions.

verify-image-extraction-mode-count.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Influences Extracted Image Count
verify-image-extraction-mode-count.description: Creates a PDF with used and unused images, then uses PdfExtractor with different ImageExtractionMode settings to assert the correct number of images are extracted.

extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image as a PNG with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP
extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and bundle them into a ZIP archive.

generate-contact-sheet-pdf-from-images.title: Generate Contact Sheet PDF with Image Thumbnails
generate-contact-sheet-pdf-from-images.description: The example extracts all images from a source PDF using PdfExtractor and creates a new PDF that arranges those images as thumbnails in a grid, producing a contact sheet.

extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio from Extracted Images
extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using the PdfExtractor facade and assemble them into a new PDF where each image occupies its own page.

extract-images-to-sqlite.title: Extract Images from PDF and Store as SQLite BLOBs
extract-images-to-sqlite.description: Creates a sample PDF with an image, extracts all images using PdfExtractor, and saves each image as a BLOB in a SQLite database.

extract-images-with-watermark.title: Extract Images from PDF After Adding Watermark
extract-images-with-watermark.description: The example adds a PNG watermark to every page of a PDF using PdfFileMend, then extracts all images from the watermarked document and saves them as PNG files.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-base64-json.title: Extract Images from PDF and Output as Base64 JSON
extract-images-from-pdf-to-base64-json.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull each image from a PDF, converts it to PNG, encodes it in Base64, gathers basic metadata, and writes a JSON array of the images.

extract-images-pdf-csv-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-pdf-csv-report.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, saves each image as a PNG file, and creates a CSV file that lists the image filenames, page numbers, and displayed dimensions.

extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create a Sprite Sheet
extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF into memory streams and merge them horizontally into a single PNG sprite sheet using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-images-to-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images and Generate PDF/A‑2b Document with XObjects
extract-images-to-pdfa2b.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on separate pages, and convert the resulting document to PDF/A‑2b compliance.

extract-images-upload-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
extract-images-upload-s3.description: Creates a sample PDF containing images, extracts those images using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads each image to an Amazon S3 bucket via a PUT request with server‑side encryption enabled.

extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as PNG files to a network‑mapped UNC directory.

extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate HTML Gallery
extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them to a folder, and then creates a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images as a gallery.

extract-pdf-images-video-slideshow.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
extract-pdf-images-video-slideshow.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then create a video slideshow from the saved JPEGs with FFmpeg.

extract-images-gcs.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-images-gcs.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts all images using Aspose.Pdf, and shows where to upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Shows how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword using TextAbsorber and then extract only the images from pages that contain that keyword.

extract-pdf-text-with-progress-bar.title: Extract PDF Text with Console Progress Bar
extract-pdf-text-with-progress-bar.description: Demonstrates extracting text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while showing a simple console progress bar that reflects the processing percentage.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, save them to a folder, and generate a markdown file that displays the images as a gallery.

extract-text-from-pdfs-using-pdfextracto.title: Extract Text from PDFs Using Aspose PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdfs-using-pdfextracto.description: Shows how to read PDF files from a mounted volume, extract their text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write the output to .txt files.
